spots.name: Lake St. Moritz
spots.description: Pristine alpine lake surrounded by mountains — frozen in winter, emerald in summer.

spots.name: Segantini Museum
spots.description: Dedicated to Giovanni Segantini's stunning alpine paintings in a domed gallery.

spots.name: Muottas Muragl
spots.description: Panoramic viewpoint at 2,456m — the best sunset in the Engadin valley.

spots.name: Hanselmann
spots.description: Legendary confectionery and café since 1894 — try the Engadin nut torte.

spots.name: Café Hauser
spots.description: Cozy alpine café with homemade cakes and sweeping mountain views.

spots.name: Badrutt's Palace Lobby Bar
spots.description: Glamorous hotel lobby café with impeccable service and alpine elegance.

spots.name: Ecco St. Moritz
spots.description: Two Michelin-star dining with creative, ingredient-driven cuisine.

spots.name: Muottas Muragl Panorama Restaurant
spots.description: Dining at altitude with unmatched views of the Engadin lakes.

spots.name: Chesa Veglia
spots.description: Historic farmhouse restaurant within Badrutt's Palace — rustic luxury.

spots.name: Bernina Express Route
spots.description: UNESCO World Heritage railway through dramatic alpine landscapes.

spots.name: Diavolezza Glacier
spots.description: Breathtaking glacier terrace — accessible by cable car, otherworldly views.

spots.name: Val Roseg
spots.description: Magical valley reachable by horse-drawn carriage or on foot — pure alpine serenity.
